AI Automation Ecosystem
  • Unified Content Orchestrator API
  • View page source

Unified Content Orchestrator API

Master integration system

Key Features

  • Make.com blueprint parsing

  • TypeScript integration

  • Multi-modal content generation

  • YouTube/Instagram pipelines

Module Reference

🎭 UNIFIED CONTENT ORCHESTRATOR

Integrates ALL your automation systems into one intelligent pipeline: - Python AI scripts (748+) - Make.com blueprints (YouTube, SEO, content generation) - TypeScript content awareness system - n8n workflows - 12 AI APIs (OpenAI, Claude, Grok, Groq, Gemini, etc.)

Features: 🔄 Make.com → Python workflow translation 🧠 Deep content awareness (semantic + contextual) 🎯 Multi-modal content generation 📊 Cross-platform publishing (YouTube, Instagram, WordPress) ⚡ Parallel processing with intelligent routing 🎨 Image generation (Leonardo, DALL-E, Stability) 🎵 Music generation (Suno) + transcription (Whisper) 📈 SEO optimization + analytics

class UNIFIED_CONTENT_ORCHESTRATOR.ContentAsset(id: str, content: str, asset_type: str, comments: str | None = None, context_metadata: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, tags: ~typing.List[str] = <factory>, tag_scores: ~typing.List[~typing.Dict[str, float]] = <factory>, embedding: ~typing.List[float] | None = None)[source]

Bases: object

Represents a content asset (from TypeScript Asset interface)

id: str
content: str
asset_type: str
comments: str | None = None
context_metadata: Dict[str, Any]
tags: List[str]
tag_scores: List[Dict[str, float]]
embedding: List[float] | None = None
__init__(id: str, content: str, asset_type: str, comments: str | None = None, context_metadata: ~typing.Dict[str, ~typing.Any] = <factory>, tags: ~typing.List[str] = <factory>, tag_scores: ~typing.List[~typing.Dict[str, float]] = <factory>, embedding: ~typing.List[float] | None = None) → None
class UNIFIED_CONTENT_ORCHESTRATOR.MakecomWorkflow(name: str, modules: List[Dict[str, Any]], flow_type: str, input_source: str, output_target: str)[source]

Bases: object

Represents a Make.com workflow (blueprint)

name: str
modules: List[Dict[str, Any]]
flow_type: str
input_source: str
output_target: str
__init__(name: str, modules: List[Dict[str, Any]], flow_type: str, input_source: str, output_target: str) → None
class UNIFIED_CONTENT_ORCHESTRATOR.ContentPipeline(id: str, name: str, steps: List[Dict[str, Any]], ai_models_used: List[str], input_data: Dict[str, Any], output_format: str, seo_optimized: bool = True, multi_modal: bool = False)[source]

Bases: object

A complete content generation pipeline

id: str
name: str
steps: List[Dict[str, Any]]
ai_models_used: List[str]
input_data: Dict[str, Any]
output_format: str
seo_optimized: bool = True
multi_modal: bool = False
__init__(id: str, name: str, steps: List[Dict[str, Any]], ai_models_used: List[str], input_data: Dict[str, Any], output_format: str, seo_optimized: bool = True, multi_modal: bool = False) → None
class UNIFIED_CONTENT_ORCHESTRATOR.UnifiedContentOrchestrator[source]

Bases: object

The ultimate content orchestration system

Combines: - Make.com workflows - Python automation scripts - TypeScript content awareness - Multi-AI processing

__init__()[source]
parse_makecom_blueprint(blueprint_path: str) → MakecomWorkflow[source]

Parse Make.com blueprint JSON and convert to executable workflow

Example blueprint: YouTube Video Description Generator

makecom_to_python(workflow: MakecomWorkflow) → str[source]

Convert Make.com workflow to Python code

Translates visual workflow to executable Python

async deep_content_analysis(asset: ContentAsset) → ContentAsset[source]

Deep content-aware analysis (integrates with TypeScript system)

Implements: - Semantic embedding - Contextual analysis - Tag inference - Confidence calibration

async generate_youtube_content(title: str, keywords: str, image_descriptions: str) → Dict[str, Any][source]

Complete YouTube content generation pipeline

Mimics Make.com blueprint but with enhanced AI

create_instagram_pipeline() → ContentPipeline[source]

Create Instagram content generation pipeline

create_music_pipeline() → ContentPipeline[source]

Create music production pipeline

export_to_n8n(pipeline: ContentPipeline, filepath: str)[source]

Export pipeline to n8n workflow JSON

async UNIFIED_CONTENT_ORCHESTRATOR.main()[source]

Demo of the unified orchestrator

Classes

class UNIFIED_CONTENT_ORCHESTRATOR.UnifiedContentOrchestrator[source]

The ultimate content orchestration system

Combines: - Make.com workflows - Python automation scripts - TypeScript content awareness - Multi-AI processing

Parse Make.com blueprint JSON and convert to executable workflow

Example blueprint: YouTube Video Description Generator

makecom_to_python(workflow: MakecomWorkflow) → str[source]

Convert Make.com workflow to Python code

Translates visual workflow to executable Python

async deep_content_analysis(asset: ContentAsset) → ContentAsset[source]

Deep content-aware analysis (integrates with TypeScript system)

Implements: - Semantic embedding - Contextual analysis - Tag inference - Confidence calibration

async generate_youtube_content(title: str, keywords: str, image_descriptions: str) → Dict[str, Any][source]
